meta.title: Privacy Policy - Blimpify
meta.description: Learn how Blimpify collects, uses, and protects your personal data

introduction.text: This privacy policy describes how Blimpify AB ("we", "us" or "Blimpify") collects, uses, stores, and protects personal data. The policy applies to you who visit our website (blimpify-im.com), our customer dashboard (app.blimpify-im.com), or otherwise interact with our services.

collection.title: 1. Personal Data We Collect
collection.intro: We collect personal data to deliver our services, improve user experience, and fulfill our legal obligations.
collection.text: When you use our services, we may collect:

items.label: Contact information:
items.value: name, email address, company name, phone number

items.label: Account and project data:
items.value: information you provide in Project Builder (e.g., choice of design, features, content, colors)

items.label: Payment information:
items.value: handled by third-party provider Stripe – we never store complete card details

items.label: Login data:
items.value: username, password (hashed), session and authentication data

items.label: Technical data:
items.value: IP address, browser, device type, interactions with our pages

items.label: User behavior:
items.value: purchase and usage history in the dashboard (app.blimpify-im.com)

purpose.title: 2. Why We Process Personal Data
items: Create and manage your account
Build, deliver, and maintain your website
Manage orders, subscriptions, and invoices
Provide customer support and revisions
Send important notices (e.g., payment confirmations, updates)
Improve and develop our services
Fulfill legal obligations (e.g., accounting requirements)
purpose.outro: Processing is based on contract, legal obligation, or our legitimate interest in delivering and improving the service.

thirdParty.title: 3. Third-Party Providers
thirdParty.intro: We use trusted providers for operating and administering our services:
thirdParty.outro: These providers meet the requirements of the EU's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and act as data processors or independent controllers according to their own privacy policies.

storage.title: 4. Storage and Security
items: We store personal data as long as you are a customer or as long as required to fulfill contracts and legal requirements.
When the subscription is terminated, the account is saved for up to 12 months for possible reactivation and receipt management.
After that time, data is deleted or anonymized, except for invoices and payment information which are saved for 7 years according to accounting law.
The purpose of saving the account after termination is to allow the customer to access their receipts and payment history via the dashboard.
Upon request for deletion, all personal data is removed, except what we are legally required to retain.
Passwords are always stored hashed and we use technical and organizational security measures to prevent unauthorized access, loss, or manipulation.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights Under GDPR
items: Request a register extract (see what data we have)
Request correction of incorrect data
Request deletion of data ("the right to be forgotten")
Restrict or object to certain processing
Request data portability (receive data in machine-readable format)
rights.contact: Requests are made via email to admin@blimpify-im.com.

cookies.title: 6. Cookies
cookies.intro: We use cookies on our websites to:
items: Keep you logged in
Save settings
Improve performance and user experience
cookies.warning: You can deny cookies via your browser, but some features may then stop working as intended.
cookies.link: More information can be found in our Cookie Policy.

policyChanges.title: 7. Changes to the Policy
items: We may update this policy as needed.
Significant changes are communicated via email or in the dashboard.
The latest version is always available on this page.

contact.title: 8. Contact Information
